ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the post belongs */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the post (e.g., feature, bug-fix) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies the post has received */,
  "last_post" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last post in the thread */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., active, deleted, hidden) */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is locked (no new replies allowed) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user creating the post */,
  "last_reply_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last reply to the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tag (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post to which the reply belongs */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user creating the reply */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reply (e.g., active, deleted, hidden) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the post */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the view event occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user viewing the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id")
)
